付寒穿越到御兽世界，却发现自己被分配了一块石头当初始宠物。
“那个人好傻啊，怎么养石头？哈哈哈......”
付寒：“小强，咬他！”
说着便把石头砸了过去！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/8e6dc15f98b0fd411d3e49f23de3b379~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"野生一级布偶猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7126068325100030976","book_name":"启星大陆","book_short_name":"逐星御兽师","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7126069165294617127","read_count":"24536","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1407594"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"550","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,宠物,扮猪吃虎,无女主,开局,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/43cb6b10234b5c6eec5cfe03f15727e0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397464&x-signature=5zUpANZUxGS%2FpTwVBJ1Dz2XqDeE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"65608424529","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"600947"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323050424FC0838E6DDB578BA59CF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":33099},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7417415903253824281","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这不是一本御兽爽文，所以喜欢无脑爽文的书友们可以绕道而行了。
这是一本冒险，是一本细腻的旅行，对我而言，这本书很有原始战记的感觉，虽然不是一个风格，可是我很喜欢这本书里人物塑造，虽说不少评论说里面与御兽的篇幅不够多，这确实是一点小诟病，但真的不失为一本好书。
它不是那种只追求御兽种族的进化，技能的无脑安装，没有太多那些让人看了就觉得俗套的数据，真的很好看，不少星兽的生态系统，行为习惯，都写的很详细。
这是我继宠魅之后看过最好看的御兽文，在番茄很少见，很有文笔。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727004877,"group_id":"7126068325100030976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人到中年不风流，何以解忧少年愁","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxRBbpY09yoYppL+70ftDbLWFmQjkEdRALxH/OfaYcTK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4c505c3d53be4525a81ba17ab2d5075e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789477&x-signature=4a73kDBGW14o1KCceENTg92KsSM%3D","user_id":"2907563335106343","user_name":"李尚梧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2907563335106343","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7126068325100030976","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+御兽+进化+原创插画+扮猪吃虎+非系统+无女主】又名《无限御兽：开局宠物是块石头》，全书原创精致插画。
